_comment: MEM-CC-team-1 (ADR 0056) — config oficial MCP servers do projeto oimpresso. Commitado no repo: time inteiro vê esse arquivo via git pull. Cada dev cola seu próprio Bearer token em .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).

oimpresso._note: Tools (ADR 0070): cycles-active, cycle-goals-track, my-work, my-inbox, triage, tasks-list, tasks-detail, tasks-create, tasks-update, tasks-comment, projects-*, epics-*, dashboard-burndown, dashboard-velocity, decisions-search, decisions-fetch, sessions-recent, memoria-search, cc-search, claude-code-usage-self. Token via .claude/settings.local.json

laravel-boost._note: Boost local — tools de framework (Laravel route:list, model:show, etc). Cada dev ajusta o path do php conforme seu OS/Herd.
